name: model rationale detector accepts a prompt with a non-empty model_rationale field
command:
mkdir -p prompts/x && printf 'name: x
model: sonnet
model_rationale: chosen for cost-quality balance on triage workload
' > prompts/x/v1.0.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/model-rationale.sh" --prompt prompts/x/v1.0.0.md 2>out.txt && grep -q 'rationale_present=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
